title: BBQ Baby Back Ribs
instructions: Grill low and slow for 3 hours.

reviews.text: Fall-off-the-bone tender! I added a splash of apple cider vinegar to the BBQ sauce and a dash of smoked paprika. Also drizzled with honey at the end.
Great ribs! Added extra brown sugar and a pinch of cayenne. Served with coleslaw and cornbread.
Perfect recipe! Followed it exactly and turned out great. Will make again.
Really good recipe. My family loved it. Simple to follow.
It was okay. Nothing special but edible. Might make again with changes.
Didn't work for me. Flavor was off and texture was wrong.
